function.message: Rescheduled Nordlicht Health follow-up to two weeks from today (2027-01-01) with a focused diff. Updated reminder due date and the owning account follow-up date.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied AGENTS rule: when rescheduling follow-up, update both reminder and owning account if both carry the date. Anchored relative time to context date 2026-12-18.
function.outcome_justification: reminders/rem_001.json had due_on=2026-12-10 and accounts/acct_001.json had next_follow_up_on=2026-12-10; both were updated to 2027-01-01 (two weeks after 2026-12-18).
